title: Hytale Menus
description:
A pack that imagines what a hytale menu screen could look like in Minecraft

#savehytale
body:
This is a modpack that aims to recreate the Hytale menu screen in Minecraft!

This modpack just has a couple optimization mods needed to run the game and the custom menu. You should be able to add your regular fabric mods without to many conflicts.

As far as im aware, the menu buttons are only correctly aligned in fullscreen mode, do not change the GUI scale.

No Risk, No Story
